description: A moderately permissioned configuration for development tasks. Includes shell and file access but limits web and communication capabilities.

permissions.details: Access to package registries and documentation sites only
Read files across the project workspace
Write to project workspace directories only
Execute approved build, test, and development commands
Connected to version control (git) skill only
Outbound to package registries (npm, pypi) and git remotes
System modification not permitted in development workflow
